title: webdriverio@4.3.0 breaks build ⚠️
body:
Hello lovely humans, [webdriverio](https://www.npmjs.com/package/webdriverio) just published its new version 4.3.0.
State Failing tests :warning:
Dependency webdriverio
New version 4.3.0
Type devDependency
This version is **covered** by your **current version range** and after updating it in your project **the build kept failing**. **It looks like your project, in its current form, is malfunctioning** and this update didn’t really change that. I don’t want to leave you in the dark about updates though. I recommend you get your project passing and then check the impact of this update again. Do you have any ideas how I could improve these pull requests? Did I report anything you think isn’t right? Are you unsure about how things are supposed to work? There is a collection of [frequently asked questions](https://greenkeeper.io/faq.html) and while I’m just a bot, there is a group of people who are happy to teach me new things. [Let them know](https://github.com/greenkeeperio/greenkeeper/issues/new). Good luck with your project :sparkles: You rock! :palm_tree: --- The new version differs by 93 commits . - [`57d68f5`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/57d68f5ed551071f9b77136b49e094710b508ada) v4.3.0 - [`81dda1c`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/81dda1c7552653df71c1851d612f138d16e7420e) Update contributors - [`9317643`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/9317643e35d4d01c9e6b16e5779addbc16aaf19c) updated changelog - [`4004c62`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/4004c6232cb5284d4aab38503dd66614b6a8452c) polished up guide section - [`9c2059c`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/9c2059cc21fd2e1ceee066a730b3d457f06418f2) bumped wdio-mocha-framework [ci skip] - [`94a902a`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/94a902a59d9dbb43befe81571cf57aa4fdf66e21) minor [ci skip] - [`e7bb04f`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/e7bb04f21b7c4bb30b5dd7048f108afff1dd40cd) don't build the project twice - [`e72015e`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/e72015edec2cf5816ab8290a21bef48765363c59) more build fixes - [`f6f300e`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/f6f300e308a42732aa3bae7b1ac306057c96a477) fix some build issues - [`b7c0754`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/b7c0754ba67ef01b9ea00cc83980c65ed7b2e98c) remove grunt-cordova-cli as well - [`2c317ba`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/2c317baa90a6e6549bbd69a9a8613d5bf2de6ffa) remove cordova dev dependency as it installs vulnarable deps - [`e4b5640`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/e4b5640af43ac0dfd65affccbe3da86754a78008) add native test for touchActions - [`5471794`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/5471794b8b5b9f35f835d0d3466cd4cd8b90643c) eslint fixes - [`7091be6`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/7091be620ba94a2c6b04df197e9e896e8e1efbf9) no need for phantomjs prebuild as it is already available on travis - [`a44eae6`](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/commit/a44eae6e7019086b030e20785f8a92e8b4a833bd) don't propagate selector if x and y is given There are 93 commits in total. See the [full diff](https://github.com/webdriverio/webdriverio/compare/d14d392773d42d000ac0255a41d30ddf6dd0fd59...57d68f5ed551071f9b77136b49e094710b508ada). --- This pull request was created by [greenkeeper.io](https://greenkeeper.io/). Tired of seeing this sponsor message? :zap: `greenkeeper upgrade`
